notes: Job-site air quality monitoring, documentation and reporting. Emphasise data capture, real instruments and safe mitigation. Australian restoration job site, metric readings, professional PPE. No on-image text (so no readable report pages or screen values), no brand names/logos.

images.context: Course hero for 'Documenting and Reporting Air Quality Improvements'
images.prompt: A restoration technician in hi-vis and an N95 respirator on a tidy Australian job site, mid-distance and over the shoulder, recording air quality readings onto a rugged tablet on a clipboard while a HEPA air scrubber runs in the background. Bright, organised worksite, cool daylight, focused and professional. Realistic professional photography, aspirational.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no readable screen text, no clutter, no debris piles

images.context: Module 3 — tools for monitoring: particulate counter and gas detection meter
images.prompt: A close hands-on-task view of a technician's gloved hands holding a handheld particulate counter, with a compact multi-gas detection meter clipped to a chest strap, taking a reading in a bright Australian interior undergoing restoration. Focus on the instruments, shallow depth of field, clean and precise. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no fake numeric readouts, no clutter

images.context: Module 4 — mitigation: HEPA air scrubber and negative air machine controlling contaminants
images.prompt: A HEPA air scrubber and a negative air machine set up in a containment area sealed with plastic sheeting on a bright Australian restoration site, ducting neatly routed, a technician in PPE checking the setup in the mid-distance. Orderly, safe, professional airflow management. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no visible mould, no mess, no US-style power outlets
